# Cache — utility priorities

| Target | Timing | Thrower | Purpose | Follow-up / fallback |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| T smoke Highway from Mid | Mid take | Mid support | Lets the team enter Connector safely | Hold Mid and rotate through Vent |
| T smoke CT/Heaven for A | A execute | Support | Cuts the strongest retake sightlines | Plant default and fight from Squeaky/Quad |
| T molly Forklift | A entry | Entry support | Removes the close rifle hold | Clear Quad with a flash |
| T smoke Heaven for B | B execute | Support | Stops Rafters seeing the entry | Take Checkers before the smoke fades |
| CT smoke B Main on retake | B retake | Rotator | Blocks the T exit and buys a defuse path | Flash only with a teammate |

## Visual lineups

### T molly Forklift

**Side / role:** T / Entry support<br>
**Timing:** A entry<br>
**Purpose:** Removes the close rifle hold

1. **Start:** Set up in A Main at the source's marked throw position before the entry pair exposes itself to Forklift. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://csnades.gg/cache/molotovs/forklift-from-a-main)
2. **Aim:** Use the source's precise crosshair reference and running left-click release; the page provides the video rather than a dependable text-only pixel landmark. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://csnades.gg/cache/molotovs/forklift-from-a-main)
3. **Result:** The molotov lands at Forklift and forces the close rifle hold away from the first A Main duel. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://csnades.gg/cache/molotovs/forklift-from-a-main)

**Fallback:** Clear Quad with a flash
**Source:** [CSNADES.gg - Cache Molotov Forklift from A Main](https://csnades.gg/cache/molotovs/forklift-from-a-main) (checked 2026-07-13; published 2026-05-17 for the returned CS2 Cache)

### T smoke Heaven for B

**Side / role:** T / Support<br>
**Timing:** B execute<br>
**Purpose:** Stops Rafters seeing the entry

1. **Start:** Use the B Halls setup shown in the remote guide and hold the entry until the support player is ready to release. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)
2. **Aim:** Follow the guide's B Halls-to-Heaven video for the precise roof-gap crosshair and jump-throw; do not substitute an unverified text-only pixel. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)
3. **Result:** The smoke blocks B Heaven/Rafters vision so the first two players can clear Checkers and enter B Main together. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)

**Fallback:** Take Checkers before the smoke fades
**Source:** [Profilerr - Best Cache Smokes in CS2](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/) (checked 2026-07-13; referenced section: “B Halls to B Heaven”)

### CT smoke B Main on retake

**Side / role:** CT / Rotator<br>
**Timing:** B retake<br>
**Purpose:** Blocks the T exit and buys a defuse path

1. **Start:** Set up in B Heaven at the source's retake-safe corner after a teammate is ready to pressure from Checkers or CT. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)
2. **Aim:** Follow the B Heaven-to-B Main video for the rafters/wall reference and crouched throw; the remote visual is the authority for the exact pixel. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)
3. **Result:** The deep smoke blocks the B Main exit, buying a safer defuse route while the second retaker flashes or clears the nearest site angle. [Remote source - not stored locally](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/)

**Fallback:** Flash only with a teammate
**Source:** [Profilerr - Best Cache Smokes in CS2](https://profilerr.net/cache-smokes-in-cs2/) (checked 2026-07-13; referenced section: “B Heaven to B Main (Deep)”)
